item.title: Implementing Automatic Struct-of-Array Conversion in C
item.description: A brief exploration of some older, lesser-known metaprogramming techniques

item.title: A comparison of Rust's borrow checker to the one in C#
item.description: Different approaches to memory safety through static analysis

item.title: Laundercat: The Plagiarizing Neural Network
item.description: This is an idea that's been bouncing around in my head for a while, but which I was reluctant to publish due to the fear that it might come across as more bitter than funny. I wanted to learn LaTeX, though, and this seemed like a good first project to try out its various features. Please don't take it too seriously! Or do, I guess. I'm not your therapist.

item.title: Dead Button Syndrome
item.description: I wanted to bring up an issue I've run into increasingly often, and ended up writing a short history of the SSR/CSR pendulum swing (as I understand it, anyway).
